title: Node-to-DOF mapping is cached but remains serial-only
description: Fixed: FEMProblem/NeumannPoissonSolver now owns a cached DOLFINxP1Mapping with node_to_dof, dof_to_node and serial metadata, and existing helpers delegate to that cache. Remaining limitation: the coordinate-based mapping intentionally supports only serial scalar P1 tetra spaces.
recommendation: For MPI benchmarks, replace the serial coordinate matching with an ownership-aware DOLFINx mapping that records local/global dof ownership and ghost semantics.

title: ForwardResult potential ordering is now explicit
description: Fixed: ForwardResult now records nodal_value_ordering, exposes dof_values for DOLFINx dof-ordered potentials, includes ordering metadata in to_dict(), and can carry meshdata_nodal_values when ForwardSolver evaluates a MeshData-ordered MeasurementOperator.
recommendation: A future API cleanup may rename nodal_values to dof_values while keeping a compatibility alias.

title: GreenTransferMatrix now carries measurement row indices
description: Fixed: GreenTransferMatrix has explicit measurement_row_indices, build_green_transfer_matrix validates one row id per retained Green function, summaries expose the row ids, and transfer cache round-trips them.
recommendation: Benchmark provenance should still validate that measurement_row_indices match the observation channel definition for cached transfers.

title: Facet/vertex ambiguity is diagnosed but still a modeling constraint
description: Fixed: barycentric boundary flags classify interior/face/edge/vertex cases; point-dipole PETSc diagnostics report is_near_cell_boundary, boundary kind and ambiguity warning; Green transfer metadata reports boundary candidate indices. Remaining limitation: source-region generation does not yet actively avoid facets.
recommendation: Add source-region generation options that filter or jitter candidates away from facets, and document the selected convention for real benchmarks.

title: Green solves require compatible reference rows but forward scenarios allow reference='none'
description: Average and single reference produce measurement rows with zero sum for P1 interpolation, but reference='none' generally produces incompatible Green RHS rows for pure Neumann systems. GreenSolver catches this, but the high-level workflow does not warn earlier.
recommendation: Add a preflight validation helper for green/inverse benchmark scenarios that reports reference compatibility and suggests average or single reference.

title: Fixed: DOLFINx point location uses a cached P1 tetra locator
description: DOLFINxP1TetraLocator now caches dof coordinates, local cell dofs/vertices/centers and a centroid KD-tree. Sources and Green transfer share it; candidate lookup and basis-gradient extraction are batched. The locator remains owned-local-cell only and may expand to all local cells in pathological cases.
recommendation: For distributed meshes, add ownership-aware global lookup or DOLFINx BVH support and benchmark pathological/nonuniform meshes.

title: Green functions are solved serially and stored by default
description: GreenSolver solves one RHS per measurement channel and keep_functions=True stores all DOLFINx Functions. This is simple and correct, but memory and wall time grow quickly with electrode count.
recommendation: Add chunked transfer construction, optional immediate gradient extraction without retaining all functions, and later parallel Green solves or block RHS support.

title: GreenTransferMatrix cache lacks strong provenance metadata
description: The transfer cache stores A, candidate points, DOLFINx candidate cell ids, measurement row ids, sign and user metadata. It still does not require geometry id, mesh hash, electrode set id, reference, source-region id, sigma or code version. A stale transfer can be paired with incompatible forward records.
recommendation: Define a required TransferProvenance metadata schema and validate it in inverse benchmark scenarios.

title: Inverse benchmark supports only one electrode subset per transfer
description: InverseBenchmarkScenario correctly rejects multiple electrode_set_name values, but users running large forward sweeps must manually filter records and manage one transfer per electrode/reference configuration.
recommendation: Add an orchestration helper that groups ForwardBenchmarkResult records by electrode_set/reference and dispatches each group to the matching transfer matrix.

title: Inverse tie and rank-deficiency diagnostics are weak
description: SingleDipoleInverseSolver uses min residual and therefore picks the first candidate in ties. condition_number is recorded but no ambiguity flag or top-k gap metric is computed.
recommendation: Add best-vs-second residual gap, rank/condition warnings and optional tie policy. Include these in inverse benchmark summaries.

title: Solver lifecycle relies on manual destroy calls
description: Benchmarks use try/finally, but normal user workflows can forget solver.destroy() and leak PETSc objects. This matters in sweeps and notebooks.
recommendation: Add context manager support to FEMProblem/NeumannPoissonSolver and update examples to use with-statements once available.

title: Outside electrodes are centrally projected before measurements
description: Fixed: build_measurement_operator now centrally projects electrodes outside the tetra volume onto a supplied surface mesh or an inferred tetra boundary, and stores an electrode_projection summary in metadata. Direct point location remains strict for non-electrode points.
recommendation: For real torso studies, review projection distances and consider adding surface-normal or nearest-surface projection modes if central projection is not appropriate for a registration workflow.

title: End-to-end tests use small synthetic meshes only
description: The project has good unit and small integration tests, including forward-green and forward-green-inverse consistency. It does not yet have a noncommitted real-mesh regression or a larger synthetic mesh benchmark smoke test.
recommendation: Add a deterministic medium-size synthetic mesh smoke test and, if licensing/size allows, a tiny representative gmsh fixture with physical groups and electrodes.

title: The name cell_id is overloaded across MeshData and DOLFINx orderings
description: The code documents the distinction well, but generic names like cell_id, candidate_cell_ids and source_cell_id still appear in public dataclasses and records with different semantics.
recommendation: For a future API cleanup, introduce explicit meshdata_cell_id, dolfinx_cell_id and candidate_dolfinx_cell_ids names while keeping compatibility aliases.

title: Coordinate units are documented but not enforced in metadata
description: Documentation now requires mesh, source and electrode coordinates to share one frame and unit system and states that no automatic mm/m conversion occurs. Benchmark/cache schemas still do not require a coordinate-units field.
recommendation: Require benchmark and transfer provenance metadata to state coordinate units and registration frame.

title: DOLFINx gating convention is consistent but split between pytestmark and local markers
description: All DOLFINx tests are gated with RUN_DOLFINX_TESTS and importorskip. Some files use module-level pytestmark and others use requires_dolfinx markers. This is functional but slightly uneven.
recommendation: Optional cleanup: centralize the gating helper in a small test utility if tests keep growing.
